tags.evidence: look at one closely, at the red eye
built for stillness rather than speed
the work of protecting the world begins with learning to see it
say something true to the birds
who find the nests and say something true to the birds
these are enclosures
what people keep building despite everything
He walks his neighborhood every day
tells the herons, with his words, that he loves them
to leave anyway, eventually
hold the full argument and the full feeling simultaneously
the feeling itself — named, grounded, located
naming what the dam project's accounting couldn't see
the shared capacity to perceive clearly
Once you've been to those places, you can't un-know them
refused to let it sever the relationship
They've been coming back every spring
The residents who were removed are not named
This is enclosure in its full form
kept meeting, so that the next problem
leverage accumulating into capacity
she can refuse to provide the legitimacy
the refusal to call the loss progress
the naming, the seeing clearly
made something together that none of them could
Taking back space that was given to cars
made something together that none of them could have made alone
I watched from the edge
the community gathers to rebuild it
in the morning, the community gathers to rebuild
The Tribunal de las Aguas convenes
A place where people could just be
the knowledge of what people needed before they asked
Once you have the name, you can see it everywhere
Take them there. Let the forest do
who stands inside it for long enough
And they went silent
trying to create conditions for all week
For twenty minutes, we stalked that deer
The children moved like they'd been doing it
standing in the presence of a tree
The networks exist. You follow the thread
paying attention to what everyone around me is paying attention to
listening to the birds, who are commenting on our collective energy
the moment when someone notices something they haven't noticed
like a seed sprouting. My job is to water it
Too much attention, too much validation
maneuvering the conditions so that a connection can happen
